post.subject: Damn i want some Wotsits
post.body: I decided to go buy some beer tonight. 4 cans of Bud. 4 cans of Harp. A Quarter bottle of Vodka. Bottle of coke and a packet of Wotsits. Now i got a massive craving for some more wotsits. Im gona watch American Beauty in a few mins, then i very well may take the 15min walk up to the 24hr shop and buy some wotsits.
